title: Better Free AI Image than Midjourney?
summary: Jack Roberts claims Ideogram 4.0 excels at rendering text within images, surpassing Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on design benchmarks, and offers this capability at no cost. The video positions Ideogram 4.0 as a free alternative for generating logos, signs, and infographics with accurate text rendering.
writeup: The video reviews Ideogram 4.0, focusing on its ability to render legible text inside generated images. Jack Roberts claims it surpasses Midjourney and Google's Nano Banana Pro on design benchmarks, with the added point that the capability is available at no cost. The takeaway is positioning Ideogram 4.0 as a free option for producing logos, signs, and infographics where accurate text matters.
